name: Platform-Neutral Authentication Standards
consequences: Immediate: Develop open standards for device-agnostic authentication → Systemic: Reduces vendor lock-in by 25% in public-sector identity systems (based on MitID dependency mapping) → Strategic: Positions Denmark as a leader in EU-wide interoperability frameworks. Controls standardization vs. vendor flexibility. Weakness: The options fail to account for legacy system integration challenges.
options: Adopt FIDO2/WebAuthn as baseline with minimal modifications
Enhance existing eIDAS2 protocols with modular trust anchors
Pilot blockchain-based decentralized identifiers (DIDs) for fallback authentication
review: Controls standardization vs. vendor flexibility. Weakness: The options fail to account for legacy system integration challenges.
